data.acceptance:
1. Child close console.log line includes: code, signal, exitReason, msSinceLastStdout, lastEventType, aborted, iteration, beat.
2. Signal comes from Node's close event second argument.
3. exitReason is read from the runtime state before runtime.dispose(). If no explicit reason was set, fallback to 'normal'.
4. SessionRuntimeState exposes a lastStdoutAt field updated on each stdout chunk in doWireStdout.
5. recordTakeLoopLifecycle 'child_close' event payload also includes signal, exitReason, msSinceLastStdout, lastEventType.
6. Initial-io close handler mirrors the same enriched fields.
7. All lint/typecheck/test/build pass.
